'''gadhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doab|doab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doab|doab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gadhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædheyeth|gædheyeth]] || [[word:gædheyej|gædheyej]] || [[word:gædheyesh|gædheyesh]] || [[word:gædheye|gædheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhodhoyoth|gadhodhoyoth]] || [[word:gadhodhoyoj|gadhodhoyoj]] || [[word:gadhodhoyosh|gadhodhoyosh]] || [[word:gadhodhoyo|gadhodhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhoyoth|gadhoyoth]] || [[word:gadhoyoj|gadhoyoj]] || [[word:gadhoyosh|gadhoyosh]] || [[word:gadhoyo|gadhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhofyoth|gadhofyoth]] || [[word:gadhofyoj|gadhofyoj]] || [[word:gadhofyosh|gadhofyosh]] || [[word:gadhofyof|gadhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadhoyotho|gadhoyotho]] || [[word:gadhoyojo|gadhoyojo]] || [[word:gadhoyosho|gadhoyosho]] || [[word:gadhoyoko|gadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadhoyoth|gadhoyoth]] || [[word:gadhoyoj|gadhoyoj]] || [[word:gadhoyosh|gadhoyosh]] || [[word:gadhoyo|gadhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadhoyothol|gadhoyothol]] || [[word:gadhoyojol|gadhoyojol]] || [[word:gadhoyoshol|gadhoyoshol]] || [[word:gadhoyokol|gadhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadhoyothotho|gadhoyothotho]] || [[word:gadhoyojojo|gadhoyojojo]] || [[word:gadhoyoshosho|gadhoyoshosho]] || [[word:gadhoyoko|gadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadhoyothon|gadhoyothon]] || [[word:gadhoyojon|gadhoyojon]] || [[word:gadhoyoshon|gadhoyoshon]] || [[word:gadhoyokon|gadhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadhoyothoro|gadhoyothoro]] || [[word:gadhoyojoro|gadhoyojoro]] || [[word:gadhoyoshoro|gadhoyoshoro]] || [[word:gadhoyokoro|gadhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
